/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tests/abi/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tests/cmake_add_subdirectory/project/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tests/cmake_fetch_content/project/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tests/cmake_fetch_content2/project/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tests/cmake_import/project/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tests/cmake_import_minver/project/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tests/cmake_target_include_directories/project/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/_deps/nlohmann_json-src/tools/macro_builder/main.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/utils/DatabaseManager.cpp.o -o community_health_server  -lmysqlclient /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
